questions.question: What best describes your body frame?

options.text: Thin, lean, tall or short, difficulty gaining weight
Medium build, muscular, well-proportioned
Large, broad, sturdy, gains weight easily

questions.question: How would you describe your skin?

options.text: Dry, rough, thin, cool to touch, prone to cracking
Warm, slightly oily, sensitive, prone to rashes or acne
Thick, smooth, oily, cool, pale, rarely breaks out
Dry, frizzy, thin, prone to split ends
Fine, straight, prone to early greying or thinning
Thick, wavy, lustrous, oily

questions.question: How would you describe your eyes?

options.text: Small, dry, active, dark brown or black
Medium, sharp, penetrating, light brown, green or grey
Large, calm, attractive, blue or deep brown

questions.question: What best describes your teeth and gums?

options.text: Irregular, protruding, thin gums, prone to receding
Medium, yellowish, soft gums that bleed easily
Large, white, strong, healthy gums

questions.question: How would you describe your nails?

options.text: Dry, brittle, rough, crack easily
Soft, pink, flexible, medium strength
Thick, strong, smooth, white
Prominent, crack often, prone to stiffness
Loose, flexible, moderate
Large, well-padded, well-lubricated
Irregular — sometimes good, sometimes weak, bloating and gas common
Strong — can eat large meals, get irritable if meals are skipped, prone to acidity
Slow but steady — can skip meals without discomfort, feels heavy after eating

questions.question: How would you describe your appetite?

options.text: Variable — sometimes ravenous, sometimes no appetite
Strong and sharp — must eat on time or get irritable
Moderate and consistent — can comfortably skip meals
Irregular, dry, hard, prone to constipation
Regular, loose, sometimes burning, 2+ times daily
Regular, heavy, slow, well-formed, once daily
Very little, even in heat
Profusely, especially in heat; body odor can be strong
Moderate but consistent; sweat is cool
Dislike cold; prefer warmth; hands and feet are often cold
Dislike heat; prefer cool environments; feel warm easily
Tolerate most temperatures; dislike cold and damp
Variable — sometimes very thirsty, sometimes forget to drink
Frequently thirsty, need water often
Rarely thirsty, can go long without water
Light, interrupted, difficulty falling asleep, less than 6 hours
Moderate, sound when asleep but can wake easily, 6-7 hours
Deep, heavy, hard to wake up, 8+ hours, love sleeping

questions.question: How does your energy fluctuate through the day?

options.text: Bursts of energy followed by fatigue; energy is inconsistent
Strong and focused during the day; moderate and steady
Slow to start but once going, have good stamina and endurance
Low — catch colds easily, recover slowly
Moderate — prone to fevers, inflammation, infections
Strong — rarely fall sick, but when sick it lingers (congestion, mucus)

questions.question: What type of pain or discomfort do you experience most?

options.text: Sharp, shifting, nerve-related pain; cramps and spasms
Burning, inflammatory pain; headaches; acid reflux
Dull, heavy aches; congestion; water retention

questions.question: How would you describe your mind?

options.text: Quick, restless, imaginative, many ideas at once
Sharp, focused, analytical, critical
Calm, steady, methodical, slow but thorough
Learn quickly but forget quickly; grasp concepts fast
Learn at moderate pace with good comprehension; logical approach
Learn slowly but never forget; need repetition
Short-term is good but long-term is weak
Sharp and precise; good recall
Takes time to memorize but retains for a very long time
Easily distracted; mind jumps between topics
Intense focus but can become obsessive or overworked
Steady, sustained focus once engaged; slow to start
Active, flying, running, fearful, vivid but forgotten quickly
Intense, colorful, fiery, conflict-driven, adventurous
Calm, romantic, watery, few dreams, peaceful

questions.question: How do you typically respond to stress?

options.text: Become anxious, worried, fearful, overthink
Become irritable, angry, frustrated, critical
Withdraw, become quiet, avoid confrontation, feel stuck

questions.question: What emotions do you experience most often?

options.text: Anxiety, nervousness, excitement, enthusiasm
Ambition, determination, frustration, impatience
Contentment, attachment, sentimentality, lethargy
Make friends easily but relationships can be superficial; changeable
Selective with friendships; loyal but can be demanding or jealous
Deep, lasting bonds; very loyal; can become possessive or dependent

questions.question: How would you describe your speech?

options.text: Fast, talkative, may go off-topic, variable volume
Clear, sharp, precise, sometimes argumentative or cutting
Slow, deliberate, melodious, thoughtful, few words
Fast, light, unsteady, quick steps
Determined, purposeful, moderate pace
Slow, steady, graceful, unhurried
Spend impulsively; money comes and goes easily
Spend on quality and luxury; planned but generous
Save well; cautious with spending; accumulate wealth
Quickly but often change my mind; indecisive
Decisively and confidently; rarely second-guess
Slowly and carefully; once decided, rarely change

questions.question: How do you feel about routines?

options.text: Dislike routine; prefer variety and spontaneity
Like structured routines; enjoy planning and organizing
Love routine; feel uncomfortable with change

questions.question: How does your creativity express itself?

options.text: Highly imaginative; many ideas; artistic but scattered
Inventive and strategic; good at problem-solving and innovation
Steady and practical; good at refining and perfecting ideas

questions.question: How would you describe your voice?

options.text: Hoarse, thin, weak, or cracking
Sharp, clear, commanding, medium pitch
Deep, pleasant, melodious, resonant

questions.question: If applicable, how is your menstrual cycle?

options.text: Irregular, scanty, painful cramps, dark blood
Regular, heavy flow, warm, prone to PMS irritability
Regular, moderate, mild symptoms, water retention
Multitasker; enthusiastic starter but may not finish; works in bursts
Goal-oriented; competitive; efficient; can overwork
Steady, reliable; prefers a set pace; great at completing tasks
Forgive easily; don't hold grudges; forget quickly
Take time to forgive; may hold resentment; need resolution
Slow to anger but slow to forgive; hold on for a long time

scoring.method: Sum scores per dosha. Highest = dominant dosha. If two are close (within 15%), classify as dual-dosha.
